headline: What Pilot's Meridian OS could ship next on Vercel
subheadline: A look at how AI-native product teams ship agent features, scale customer-facing apps, and launch new portals fast — built for Pilot's next stage of growth.
personalNote: Hi Jessica — as a founder who spent 7 years as CTO before becoming CEO, I figured you'd want the engineering detail, not just the pitch. This page maps a few concrete opportunities for Pilot's AI automation push and partner expansion to real patterns other teams have used on Vercel.

opportunities.title: Ship Meridian OS AI features faster
opportunities.pain: Building agent UIs, streaming responses, and human-in-the-loop review flows for Meridian OS without owning brittle inference orchestration infra.
opportunities.solution: Vercel's AI SDK and fluid compute give multi-provider model support, streaming/tool-calling primitives, and automatic scaling for bursty AI workloads.
opportunities.outcome: Ship new AI-driven product surfaces in days, not months, without a dedicated infra team.

opportunities.title: Scale the customer dashboard with confidence
opportunities.pain: Growing engineering org and 3,000+ customers puts pressure on deployment velocity and safety for the core financial dashboard.
opportunities.solution: Instant PR previews, Git-connected deploys, and fast builds on Vercel's Frontend Cloud.
opportunities.outcome: Ship new financial features faster with less regression risk on a product that handles customer financial data.

opportunities.title: Launch the Local Partner Program portal fast
opportunities.pain: Standing up a new multi-tenant, partner-facing portal without diverting engineers from Meridian OS.
opportunities.solution: Vercel's multi-tenant SaaS toolkit automates custom domain and SSL provisioning per partner.
opportunities.outcome: Get the partner portal live and iterating quickly with a small team, supporting the new distribution channel's growth targets.

stats.label: less time managing frontend infra (Forrester TEI)
lower AI infra cost vs self-hosting (Durable)

stories.summary: AI agents serving ~1.1B tokens/day with just 6 engineers, shipping new production agents in a day.

stories.metricLabel: revenue growth scaled on Next.js + Vercel
stories.summary: Scaled its frontend through major revenue growth as a regulated, growth-stage B2B finance/HR SaaS company.

stories.metricLabel: month-over-month growth in active custom domains
stories.summary: Grew to 3,000+ active custom domains on Vercel's multi-tenant SaaS toolkit.
